text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 73 

ETHNCTY_CD 

LABEL: Ethnicity Code — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: A code indicating that the beneficiary’s ethnicity is Hispanic, Latino/a, or Spanish; most recent in the 
calendar and the two prior years. 

SHORT NAME: ETHNCTY_CD 

LONG NAME: ETHNCTY_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF
